title: NBP Exchange Rates
subtitle: Polish National Bank — live currency and gold price data

filters.tabsScrollHint: Swipe sideways to see more tables.

grid.noData: No data for the selected filters.

chart.heading: Exchange rate chart
chart.noData: No data — select a currency code and a valid date range.
chart.tapHint: Tap a point to pin details

tableDesc.B: Average exchange rates — minor and exotic currencies
tableDesc.gold: Spot gold price in PLN per gram

errors.fetch: Failed to load data. Please try again.

settings.layoutHelp: Controls table and tile density for the active group.
settings.rowsPerPageHelp: Sets how many table rows are shown before pagination.
settings.tileItemsPerPageHelp: Sets how many cards appear on one tiles page.
settings.tileColumnsHelp: Limits how many cards can sit in one row on wide screens.
settings.chartHelp: Controls chart behavior, range shortcuts, and visual helpers.
settings.chartHoverHelp: Show live hover details only. Best for desktop pointer input.
settings.chartPinnedHelp: Tap or click a point to keep its details visible.
settings.chartOffHelp: Hide hover details and keep the chart minimal.
settings.showLegendHelp: Shows the series labels below the chart for quick recognition.
settings.showGridHelp: Draws grid lines that follow the chart ticks and actual data density.
settings.gaplessTimelineHelp: Fills missing calendar days so weekends and holidays do not break the trend line.
settings.axisModeHelp: Chooses how much chart chrome is visible under the plot.
settings.axisLabelsHelp: Shows the axis labels and values at the chart edges.
settings.axisTooltipHelp: Hides axis labels and relies on hover or tap details.
settings.axisCombinedHelp: Moves the main summary below the chart instead of showing full axis labels.
